INSERT INTO key_value_test VALUES ('name:neymar, age:31, team:psg,nationality:brazil');
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs(data) AS kv FROM key_value_test;
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs(data, '=', ',') AS kv FROM key_value_test;
INSERT INTO key_value_test VALUES ('name:\'neymar\'; age:31; team:psg; nationality:brazil');
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs('name:\'neymar\'; age:31; team:psg; nationality:brazil', ':', ';', '\'') AS kv;
INSERT INTO nested_test VALUES ('outer_key:outer_value; inner_key:inner_value1; inner_key2:value2');
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs(data) AS outer_kv, extractKeyValuePairs(inner_data) AS inner_kv FROM (SELECT data, 'inner_key:inner_value1' AS inner_data FROM nested_test) sub;
INSERT INTO key_value_test VALUES ('a:b; c:d; e:f,g:h');
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs('a:b; c:d; e:f,g:h', ':', ';,') AS kv FROM key_value_test;
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs('key1:value1;key2:value2;key3:value3', '=', ';') AS kv WHERE extractKeyValuePairs('key1:value1;key2:value2;key3:value3', '=', ';') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT() FROM (SELECT extractKeyValuePairs(data) AS kv FROM key_value_test) GROUP BY kv;
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs('nested:key=value;another_nested:key2=value2', '=', ';') AS kv FROM (SELECT data FROM key_value_test) AS sub;
SELECT extractKeyValuePairs('{name:neymar, age:31}', ':', ',', '{') AS kv FROM key_value_test;
